metadata.purpose: sprk_chartdefinition record for VisualHost 'Upcoming To Dos' card on Work Assignment main form
metadata.predecessor: Modeled on UPCOMING TASKS chart def (154bd4a4-f359-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcab)

fields.sprk_drillthroughtarget: Per R4-003 spike: web resource name only ('sprk_smarttodo.html'). VisualHost auto-injects data envelope at runtime (entityName=sprk_todo&filterField=sprk_regardingworkassignment&filterValue=<parentId>&mode=dialog) and opens via Xrm.Navigation.navigateTo with target:2 (dialog).
fields.sprk_fetchxmlquery: FetchXML per FR-32: statecode=0 AND statuscode in {1=Open, 659490001=In Progress} AND (sprk_duedate next-5-days OR sprk_todopinned=true). VisualHost adds the parent-record filter on sprk_contextfieldname at runtime.

record.sprk_fetchxmlquery:
<fetch>
  <entity name="sprk_todo">
    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" />
      <filter type="or">
        <condition attribute="statuscode" operator="eq" value="1" />
        <condition attribute="statuscode" operator="eq" value="659490001" />
      </filter>
      <filter type="or">
        <condition attribute="sprk_duedate" operator="next-x-days" value="5" />
        <condition attribute="sprk_todopinned" operator="eq" value="1" />
      </filter>
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
